qa_pair.question: Read the uml://server-info resource. What is the MCP server protocol name (server_name field)?
Read the uml://types resource. What backend does the 'class' diagram type use?
Read the uml://types resource. What backend does the 'sequence' diagram type use?
Read the uml://types resource. What backend does the 'mermaid' diagram type use?
Read the uml://types resource. What backend does the 'd2' diagram type use?
Read the uml://types resource. What backend does the 'graphviz' diagram type use?
Read the uml://types resource. What backend does the 'erd' diagram type use?
Read the uml://types resource. How many diagram types are listed? Answer with just the number.
Read the uml://workflow resource. What tool name does it recommend using first for complex diagrams?
Read the uml://formats resource. What output formats does the 'class' diagram type support? List them in alphabetical order separated by commas.
